title: 100 accurate recreation of fight between Unit 01 and Sashi

wikitext:
[]: 100% accurate recreation of fight between Unit 01 and Sashi             Quote Post by honsou » Wed Apr 01, 2015 11:17 am https://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=KWgCdyLz3pc Joking aside because New Japan is owned by Bushiroad who makes most of the really big Japanese card games, this is probably an ad for some kind of Evangelion CCG, which could be kinda cool

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 01, 2015 11:23 am Live Action Eva is on the way!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2015 12:04 pm It's an April Fool's for the Eva Battle Mission mobile game: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Zap and I got a big kick out of it since we're rassle fans.
